answers: Coworking = shared office space. Great for freelancers, remote workers, and startups who want community and structure.
Benefits: networking, professional environment, amenities (meeting rooms, fast WiFi), and reduced isolation.
Tips: try different spaces, check if noise level suits you, evaluate pricing plans, and attend community events.
Coworking ki: shared office space where different professionals work together. Networking ar productivity boost kore.
